title: TRANSFORMATION OF FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ACCORDING TO IFRS
author: Raxmatullayeva O'g'iloy Qadamovna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article considers the steps of transformation financial statements from National Accounting Standards of Uzbekistan to IFRS through transformation, ways of preparing financial statements in accordance with IFRS, advantages and disadvantages of preparing reporting method in each methods.
steps_raw: The article considers the steps of transformation financial statements from National Accounting Standards of Uzbekistan to IFRS through transformation, ways of preparing financial statements in accordance with IFRS, advantages and disadvantages of preparing reporting method in each methods.
keywords: International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS), National Accounting Standard of Uzbekistan (NASU), Transformation, Transformation outside the accounting system (external transformation model), Transformation within the accounting system, Parallel accounting.
